creator: software@bertram-scharpf.de
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #14)
> I'm not really pro in this xml catalog stuff, but my guess is that
> this entry is bogus as it refers the file itself, causing all
> these errors:

> <nextCatalog catalog="/usr/local/share/xml/catalog.ports" />

> Try backing up the file and removing this entry.

When I saw this line I immediately suspected it to cause the problem.
And indeed: I removed the line and now it compiles whithout complaint.

I do not understand where this file comes from. It is not part
of a package.

  # pkg which /usr/local/share/xml/catalog.ports
  /usr/local/share/xml/catalog.ports was not found in the database
